name: Autumn Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs, sugar, cinnamon, and melted margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar. Mix on medium speed until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Blend in vanilla extract.
3. Pour the mixture over the crust.
4. Toss apples with combined sugar and cinnamon. Spoon the apple mixture over the cream cheese layer and sprinkle with pecans.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
6. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
7. Chill.
